title: Helpful Huds
description: This mod adds a few unique toggleable HUD's to the game including but not limited to: A cardinal direction indicator, Bedrock style stats+cords and hotbar coordinates.
body:
# Helpful Huds
This mod adds a few really in my opinon useful Huds. Thats really just it!

## List of huds
- Cardinal indicator
- Bedrock style coordinates, days played and time of day indicators!
- Hotbar coordinate display!
- More coming very soon!

## Example
(V1.0 + V2.0)
![In-game version 1.0 + 2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ba35d7fbc1d113ef2e92258c41b9825704cb7e.png)

## 26/03/27
This mod is now supported on several platforms including:
- Forge
- Fabric
- NeoForge (Objectivley better than Forge)

And supports some major versions of minecraft including:
- 1.20.1
- 1.21.1
- 1.21.4 (Was in boilerplate code but I left it in anyways because the api changed a bit)
